name: Dreg
description: A town to the east of Lankshorn, connected by the Ditchway. Famed for its bogwine sausages.
notes: Shantywood Isle is a part of Dreg frequented by miscreants and shady figures who prefer not to be found.
Hogbeard, a zealot in yellow smocks, operates here. He and his followers forcibly make sinners repent in public and cannot be trusted.
The party plans to resupply here after Session 5 and equip Alfred before resuming the hunt for Shub's Nana.
